data_source.name: Star Citizen Wiki API + curated community sources
data_source.note: Ship/weapon catalog from the single-source API rebuild. Earnings Finder + Patch Hub data is community-curated and tracked separately.

key_changes_in_48: Damage Deflection Threshold system (armor meta overhaul)
4.8.1 (2026-06-03): Gatac Railen flyable (medium hybrid cargo hauler) + second Gatac industrial ship; new Defend missions; Alien Week event; 30+ fixes

4.8.3 (2026-07-01): third content drop for the Alpha 4.8 series — minor update; detailed deliverables still being documented at release. The 4.8 dynamic events (Return of XenoThreat, etc.) continue on Live.

data_quality.spot_check_validation: 3 ships + 3 weapons verified against live API — all values match exactly

notes: Patch tracking refreshed to 4.8.3-LIVE on 2026-07-01 (live build 4.8.3-LIVE.12122953). UEX economy data (Trade / Ship Dealer / Mining prices) re-ingested the same day; note UEX may briefly still tag its snapshot 4.8.2 until it re-syncs to 4.8.3. Ship/weapon game-file catalog remains the 4.8.0 single-source rebuild (unaffected by the 4.8.3 minor drop). Curated earnings/guide/event data verified current for the 4.8 line; 4.9 remains PTU.
